job.title: IT Operations Engineer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join our operations team in Toulouse. You ensure the smooth running of production information systems, supervise infrastructure, and handle incidents to guarantee service continuity.
mission.1: Ensure the daily operation of systems and applications
mission.2: Superviser les infrastructures et traiter les alertes
mission.3: Gérer les incidents et les problèmes N2/N3
mission.4: Mettre en œuvre les changements et les déploiements
mission.6: Rédiger les procédures et les runbooks
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in production informatique
profile.3: Proficiency in Linux/Windows Server et de la supervision
profile.4: Knowledge of outils de ticketing (ServiceNow, JIRA)
